name: Get DC Past Prospects for Coatings Launch

content.query:
SELECT [CustomerID]
,[LeadID]
,[FirstName]
,[LastName]
,[Address1]
,[Address2]
,[City]
,[State]
,[Zip]
,[Zip4]
,[Phone]
,[Email]
 FROM [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER]
 where Zip in
(
SELECT
[ZipCode]
 FROM [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP]
 WHERE
 BranchID = 'MAC-GSDC'
 )
